channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ASMS] Avio Smart Market Stack Limited Partners with Kissan Agri Mall to Strengthen Retail Agri Ecosystem
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Avio Smart Market Stack Limited (ASMS), formerly known as Bartronics India Limited, has entered into a strategic partnership with Kissan Agri Mall Private Limited to accelerate the deployment of a technology-driven agri-retail and supply chain ecosystem under Project AVIO Agritech. The partnership aims to build a scalable ‘phygital’ platform integrating agri-input distribution, advisory services, output market linkages, and post-harvest infrastructure. The collaboration is expected to enhance last-mile agri-retail penetration, improve supply chain efficiencies, and enable more structured market access for farmers across multiple regions.

  • ASMS and Kissan Agri Mall to build a scalable ‘phygital’ platform for agri-retail and supply chain ecosystem.
  • Partnership aims to enhance last-mile agri-retail penetration, improve supply chain efficiencies, and enable structured market access for farmers.
  • ASMS brings deep rural distribution network, digital infrastructure, and financial inclusion capabilities.
  • Kissan Agri Mall has a strong on-ground presence in agri-input retail and farmer engagement.
  • Collaboration to explore opportunities across the agricultural value chain, including technology-enabled farmer onboarding, expansion of agri-input retail and advisory services, development of structured output linkages and export facilitation, strengthening of supply chain and warehousing infrastructure, integration of financial inclusion and embedded agri-financing solutions, private label development, franchise-led expansion, and climate-smart agriculture initiatives.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARTRONICS INDIA LTD. | Category: Partnership

item.title: [DEEDEV] Dee Development Engineers Ltd Commences Commercial Production at Seamless Pipe Manufacturing Plant in Anjar, Gujarat
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dee Development Engineers Ltd has commenced commercial production at its Seamless Pipe Manufacturing Plant situated in Anjar, Gujarat. The plant has an installed capacity of 7,000 MT per annum. The company has already received an order of Rs. 58 Crores for the plant and expects it to contribute incremental revenue from seamless pipes and tubes commencing Q1 FY 2026-27. The plant is expected to strengthen the company's product portfolio and deepen backward integration.

  • Dee Development Engineers Ltd has commenced commercial production at its Seamless Pipe Manufacturing Plant in Anjar, Gujarat.
  • The plant has an installed capacity of 7,000 MT per annum.
  • The company has already received an order of Rs. 58 Crores for the plant.
  • The plant is expected to contribute incremental revenue from seamless pipes and tubes commencing Q1 FY 2026-27.
  • The plant is expected to strengthen the company's product portfolio and deepen backward integration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dee Development Engineers Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [PRIMEFRESH] Prime Fresh Ltd Receives Trading Approval for 44,715 Equity Shares from BSE Limited
item.description:
Prime Fresh Ltd has received trading approval from BSE Limited for 44,715 equity shares, which were allotted on 24th February 2026 upon conversion of 44,715 convertible warrants. The approval was granted in accordance with the listing approval granted by BSE Limited on 11th March 2026. The trading of these shares will be allowed from 19th March 2026.

  • Prime Fresh Ltd receives trading approval for 44,715 equity shares from BSE Limited.
  • The shares were allotted on 24th February 2026 upon conversion of 44,715 convertible warrants.
  • The approval is in accordance with the listing approval granted by BSE Limited on 11th March 2026.
  • Trading of these shares will be allowed from 19th March 2026.
  • The shares are issued at a premium of Rs. 154/- to Promoters on a preferential basis pursuant to conversion of warrants.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Prime Fresh Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ASTERDM] Aster DM Healthcare Ltd Closes Trading Window for Designated Persons
item.description:
Aster DM Healthcare Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, in compliance with SEBI regulations and the company's insider trading prevention code. The closure will be effective from March 19, 2026, and will reopen after 48 hours from the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure effective from March 19, 2026
  • Reopening after 48 hours from the declaration of Q4 and year ended financial results of 2026
  • Compliance with SEBI regulations and the company's insider trading prevention code

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aster DM Healthcare Ltd | Category: Other

item.title: [CHOICEIN] Choice Mutual Fund Launches Nifty 50, Nifty Next 50 Index Funds for Structured Household Investing
item.description:
Choice Mutual Fund, sponsored by Choice International Limited, has announced the launch of two new investment products: Choice Nifty 50 Index Fund and Choice Nifty Next 50 Index Fund. These funds aim to help households adopt a structured and disciplined investment approach, providing core and growth exposure to India’s top 100 companies. The New Fund Offer (NFO) for both schemes will open on 19th March 2026 and close on 2nd April 2026.

  • Launch of Choice Nifty 50 Index Fund and Choice Nifty Next 50 Index Fund by Choice Mutual Fund.
  • Aimed at helping investors build a disciplined long-term equity exposure.
  • Nifty 50 Index Fund offers exposure to India’s top 50 blue-chip companies.
  • Nifty Next 50 Index Fund provides exposure to the next tier of emerging large-cap companies.
  • Structured and disciplined investment approach for households.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CHOICE INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [TEXRAIL] Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd Secures Rs. 51.45 Crores Order from North Eastern Railway
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd has been awarded an order of Rs. 51.45 crores by North Eastern Railway for Design, supply, testing, erection and commissioning of Power Supply Installation and electrification of TSS, SSP, BSP building in GKC — VKNR Section of Varanasi Division, North Eastern Railway in connection with GKC — VKNR Doubling Project. The entire work is to be completed within 24 months from the date of issue of Letter of Acceptance.

  • Order value: Rs. 51.45 crores
  • Project: Design, supply, testing, erection and commissioning of Power Supply Installation and electrification of TSS, SSP, BSP building in GKC — VKNR Section of Varanasi Division, North Eastern Railway
  • Time period: 24 months from the date of issue of Letter of Acceptance
  • Awarded by: North Eastern Railway
  • Company: Texmaco Rail & Engineering Ltd

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TEXMACO RAIL & ENGINEERING LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [GLENMARK] Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA Launches Authorized Generic to Milnacipran Hydrochloride Tablets with $102.9 Million Market
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA (Glenmark) has announced the launch of Milnacipran Hydrochloride Tablets, 12.5 mg, 25 mg, 50 mg, and 100 mg. This launch signifies the company's commitment to bring quality and affordable alternatives to patients. According to IQVIA™ sales data for the 12-month period ending January 2026, the Savella® Tablets, 12.5 mg, 25 mg, 50 mg, and 100 mg market achieved annual sales of approximately $102.9 million. Glenmark's product is only approved for the indications listed in Glenmark’s approved label.

  • Glenmark Pharmaceuticals Inc., USA launches Milnacipran Hydrochloride Tablets, 12.5 mg, 25 mg, 50 mg, and 100 mg
  • The authorized generic to Savella® Tablets, 12.5 mg, 25 mg, 50 mg, and 100 mg
  • The Savella® Tablets market achieved annual sales of approximately $102.9 million
  • Strengthens Glenmark's commitment to bring quality and affordable alternatives for patients
  • Glenmark's product is only approved for the indications listed in Glenmark’s approved label

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GLENMARK PHARMACEUTICALS LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ZYDUSLIFE] Zydus launches Aerolife Mini™, India's first portable and foldable spacer for asthma and COPD patients
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Zydus Lifesciences Ltd. has launched Aerolife Mini™, a next-generation pMDI enhancer under an exclusive licensing arrangement with AeroDel Technology Innovations Pvt. Ltd. Aerolife Mini™ is India's first foldable spacer, designed to simplify inhaler use for asthma and COPD patients. This compact and ready-to-use device aims to achieve better drug deposition, improve compliance, enhance patient confidence, and provide greater convenience. This initiative aligns with Zydus' strategy of building innovation-led sustainable, differentiated respiratory franchises through patient-centric drug device.

  • Zydus launches Aerolife Mini™, a next-generation pMDI enhancer for asthma and COPD patients.
  • Launched under an exclusive licensing arrangement with AeroDel Technology Innovations Pvt. Ltd.
  • India's first portable and foldable spacer, designed for better drug deposition and patient convenience.
  • Aims to improve compliance and enhance patient confidence.
  • Aligned with Zydus' strategy of building innovation-led sustainable, differentiated respiratory franchises.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Zydus Lifesciences Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KHAZANCHI] Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd Forms CSR Trust 'Khazanchi Charitable Trust'
item.description:
Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd, along with its group companies, has formed a charitable trust named 'Khazanchi Charitable Trust' as per Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations. The Trust Deed was executed and registered on March 18, 2026. The Trust is set up to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities as per the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013.

  • Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd forms a charitable trust named 'Khazanchi Charitable Trust'
  • The Trust is formed in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations
  • The Trust Deed was executed and registered on March 18, 2026
  • The Trust is established to undertake Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) activities
  • The formation of the Trust is in compliance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Khazanchi Jewellers Ltd | Category: CSR

item.title: [CGPOWER] CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd Announces Resignation of Sriram Rangarajan, Executive Vice President and SBU Head- Consumer Product Business
item.description:
CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd has announced the resignation of Mr. Sriram Rangarajan, Executive Vice President and SBU Head- Consumer Product Business, due to personal reasons. The resignation will be effective from the close of business hours on 19th March, 2026. Mr. Rangarajan has been part of the Senior Management Personnel of the Company and his departure will bring changes in the senior management. The Company has provided all the necessary details as required under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations.

  • CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd announces resignation of Sriram Rangarajan, Executive Vice President and SBU Head- Consumer Product Business
  • Resignation due to personal reasons
  • Effective from the close of business hours on 19th March, 2026
  • Mr. Rangarajan was part of the Senior Management Personnel
  • Company has provided necessary details as required under Regulation 30 of the Listing Regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CG Power and Industrial Solutions Ltd | Category: Management Change
